textByHashes.9f64ac5e030b2f00cf16ec63621a5855401fff92: Not much really... I run a local shop which earns me a few trading sticks, but that's about it. I keep myself to myself really.
textByHashes.1306304c928a64aa7f0bd2751336c72d9375f6f6: They're the local currency Bwana, it's used in Tai Bwo Wannai, there's usually some odd jobs that need doing around the village which you could do to earn some trading sticks.
textByHashes.424349d37589d306bca57d0a0cb04db9e064d47a: Or, if you have something which the local villagers might like, you could sell it to me and I'll pay you for it in trading sticks.
textByHashes.89a2f1096e3a58978630a02f3528a941c0047398: Gnome cocktails! It's amazing but we all just love them! Luckily I've managed to get stocks of the gnome made cocktails and I supply those to my favourite customers. However, many of the customers really like the cocktails
textByHashes.d5e41b2c6d79f664e4e2f1853de44e4b9de51b1f: made by the adventurers passing through this way. If you ever happen to have any, bring them my way! I'll give you a good deal on it that's for sure!
textByHashes.4480512fc8c59923bded7ae7a696b201627cee7a: I think it was that gnome pilot who crashed his glider, perhaps he had a little mini-bar on board? Come to think about it, you'd expect the little guy to get his stuff together and move on out of here wouldn't you? He
textByHashes.4c76eb30679d32a15a4c4c951b7fd82e8b10ae32: must love the jungle to have stayed here so long!
textByHashes.bd34f25c5c36c443a8c55a2f404bac7dee43bff2: Yes, it's the Tai Bwo cooperative... catchy name huh! We sell a few local village trinkets and tools. Also, there are a few items that we're actually looking to stock for the locals' sake.
textByHashes.fe2939d74da473a809300e555f06d490ab1f2774: If you happen across any of them please bring them to me, I'll pay a good price for them. I'm sure you'll find the prices very reasonable.
textByHashes.db2e73fc9a3b18a0b81c4f47bf9114fc6847ba87: Sure you can...which shop would you like to see? The Cooperative or Drinks store?
textByHashes.1b621b374dc89952bab8ffd1bf56b99e930d3a6b: It's funny that actually. I've managed to get a good deal with the pilot of that gnome glider. He can supply me directly now. However, it's really interesting that the local villagers really like the gnome cocktails made by the
textByHashes.83de8e8b346cc69c275654cc92409c3b892de439: I think it may just be that they're made fresher, or there is a slight twist in the flavour of the drink, you know, a little more of this, a little less of that, it all adds up and makes for an interesting tipple!
textByHashes.5559711cdcdd758c62ac9f27ae3ae292090ec9b2: Sure, what do you want to ask?
textByHashes.33f92233a6d7ddb6ff0b03d9edb1c6a96dfbbee0: Sorry Bwana, I'm already busy, why not go and talk to Murcaily! He's around the village somewhere.
textByHashes.91a3d2f5151113a19a0e2ad6baff978959ee3c32: Yeah, you've been doing a lot of good work around here. Let me give you something for your time and effort.
textByHashes.b83d3464c69329161796f8656b2d211eb243f377: I've already given you some trading sticks and I don't have any more on me at the moment. Why not go and talk to some of the other villagers and get some contributions?
textByHashes.2c224a4bd8314c58a19d6d56b7bca06a850ac9ef: Hey there. If you can solve a question for me then you can move on.
textByHashes.2e762f066649cf809974da38c27559b6ae468719: Here, I wrote it down for you.
textByHashes.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
